title: Resolves markdown image sources to backend API endpoints for collab-specific references
purpose: Converts image source URLs that reference project-specific design or diagram assets into backend API endpoints, while leaving regular URLs unchanged.
module_context: Exports a function that accepts an image source string and context object containing project, session, and theme information.

steps.content: Extract project, session, and theme from the context, defaulting theme to 'dark'.
IF the source string is empty, return it unchanged.
IF project or session information is missing, return the source unchanged.
Construct URL parameters including project and session.
IF the source starts with '@design/', extract the ID and return a design render API endpoint.
ELSE IF the source starts with '@diagram/', extract the ID and return a diagram render API endpoint with theme parameter.
ELSE IF the source matches the designs/diagrams path pattern, extract the ID and return the appropriate API endpoint.
ELSE return the original source string unchanged.
